item.title: Sydney-based small business owner extorted over fake one-star Google reviews
item.description: ‘It‘s not right the way Google controls it and doesn’t really care.’

item.title: Aussie Lucas Herbert overcomes illness to win $5.5m LIV Golf Virginia title and US Open berth
item.description: ‘I woke up this morning probably feeling worse than I did the last few days.’

item.title: Middle East war: Trump rejects Iran’s proposal to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran’s response to a US-issued peace deal did not sit well with the US president.

item.title: Dua Lipa sues Samsung Electronics for $US15 million over unauthorised use of her image on TV boxes
item.description: The singer could be in line for a huge payout.

item.title: Actor Martin Short breaks silence on his daughter Katherine’s tragic death
item.description: ‘It’s been a nightmare for the family.’

item.title: Aussie tennis greats pay tribute as much-loved champion Mal Anderson dies aged 91
item.description: ‘Tennis in Australia has lost one of its greats, and a lot of us have lost a mate and mentor. I feel very lucky to have known him.’

item.title: Teen prodigy Ollie Peake earns ‘exciting’ first call-up to Aussie ODI squad for Pakistan tour
item.description: The 19-year-old is in the mix for an international debut while Glenn Maxwell is out as he focuses on franchise cricket.

item.title: 'ISIS brides' on slavery charges to remain behind bars as bid for freedom postponed
item.description: The women have been charged with crimes against humanity and slavery offences.

item.title: Queensland’s DNA lab clears backlog of hundreds of sexual assault kits after major delays
item.description: ‘These figures are not just statistics — they represent real people who have fallen victim to serious crime.’

item.title: Carlton and coach Michael Voss part ways amid season from hell
item.description: The nightmare is over for the AFL great following two years of ferocious scrutiny.

item.title: Aussie prodigy Emerson Jones steps up to French Open main draw with last wildcard
item.description: The 17-year-old former world No.1 junior has booked an early flight to seek a leg up in Paris.

item.title: Abbie Chatfield issues lengthy apology for resurfaced video days after Keli Holiday was detained in the US
item.description: ‘People have said that I’ve called for the assassination of Trump.’

item.title: Man arrested after alleged Armaguard robbery at Eli Waters shopping centre near Hervey Bay
item.description: The incident occurred as guards were transporting cash from a van to an ATM.

item.title: Google down: Search engine plagued with server errors as thousands report issues
item.description: The problem has yet to be addressed by the search engine provider.

item.title: Why only Aussie one state will have restaurants ranked in the prestigious Michelin Guide for the first time
item.description: Anonymous inspectors have arrived in Australia for the first time to find the best eateries.

item.title: AFL champion Luke Hodge steps down from All-Australian selection panel due to link to betting giant
item.description: ‘I thought it was the best thing to do after speaking to the AFL.’

item.title: Welsh singer Bonnie Tyler 'remains seriously ill' but stable after emergency surgery
item.description: Her doctors are positive about the Holding Out for a Hero singer’s recovery.

item.title: NBA world ‘heartbroken’ as Memphis Grizzlies veteran Brandon Clarke found dead aged 29
item.description: Authorities are investigating as the league mourns ‘an outstanding teammate and even better person’.

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Anthony Albanese and Jim Chalmers defend broken election promise in ambitious budget
item.description: The PM has faced a grilling over changes to a key housing policy in the budget.

item.title: Middle East war: Trump sparks backlash with remarks about cost of living amid Iran talks
item.description: The US president has been accused of ‘saying the quiet part out loud’.

item.title: Trailblazing NBA star Jason Collins dies from aggressive brain tumour, aged 47
item.description: ‘He was an inspiration to all who knew him and to those who admired him from afar.’

item.title: Major legislation shake-up introduced to NT Parliament after death of Kumanjayi Little Baby
item.description: ‘The ongoing cycle of harm, risk and uncertainty needs to be addressed’.

item.title: Fallout over war in Gaza overshadows Eurovision’s opening ceremony as multiple countries boycott song contest
item.description: Israel's Eurovision entry sailed through to the finals despite the backlash.

item.title: Thousands of dental patients in Strathfield urged to get tested for blood-borne viruses
item.description: Patients seen over more than 20 years are being urged to get checked.

item.title: Legendary jockey Glen Boss joins Seven for Queensland Racing Carnival
item.description: ‘Viewers are set for back-to-back weeks of unbelievable racing.’

item.title: Apology to Ms Fatma Mallouk
item.description: 7NEWS has issued the following apology.

item.title: Heartwarming update as toddler who inhaled gold cake dust now breathing ‘completely on his own’
item.description: The boy was put in a coma after the decorative powder thickened in his lungs.

item.title: Four long-running Gold Coast Boost Juice stores close after franchise operator goes into liquidation
item.description: Some stores had been open more than 20 years, while the family behind them is also selling a waterfront mansion once home to AFL players.

item.title: Singer Cody Simpson suffers serious injury to his vocal cords, cancels performances and faces possible surgery
item.description: The singer says he has been ordered into weeks of silence.

item.title: Indigenous groups slam sweeping child safety reforms following death of Kumanjayi Little Baby
item.description: ‘Lowering the threshold will deepen an already devastating crisis.’

item.title: Australian researchers use artificial intelligence to detect heart disease years before heart attack
item.description: A simple scan could save your life.

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Coalition reveals plan to block migrants from Centrelink welfare payments in budget response
item.description: Non-citizens currently have access to 17 different welfare payments on various waiting times.

item.title: Middle East war: Israel continues devastating attacks on Lebanon despite ceasefire agreement
item.description: Numerous towns and villages have been reduced to rubble in the weeks since the ceasefire was signed.

item.title: Fremantle coach Justin Longmuir lifts lid on Wharfie Time button that ‘spooks the opposition’
item.description: ‘It clearly helps us as a team.’

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Government responds as call for boost to Centrelink payments goes unheard
item.description: An advisory committee identified a ‘critical need’ among recipients for the increase.

item.title: 'Rough is pretty gnarly': Golfers brace for major test at PGA Championship in Pennsylvania
item.description: Six Aussies are in the field and expecting a fierce challenge in the second major of the year.

item.title: Australian Test batter Marcus North explains decision to become England selector
item.description: The 46-year-old Melburnian’s use of one interesting word will not go unnoticed back home.

item.title: Brisbane man faces more than two dozen charges over alleged hours-long knifepoint car theft spree from Chelmer to Chermside
item.description: ‘He picked the wrong car.’

item.title: Alex Murdaugh: Juror who helped convict former lawyer shocked by decision to overturn guilty verdict
item.description: The disgraced former lawyer will now face a new trial in the killings of his wife and son.

item.title: Russia bombards Ukrainian capital Kyiv during ‘massive attack’ from drones and missiles
item.description: The missile and drone attack struck buildings in different districts of the city, including in residential areas.

item.title: Australians on hantavirus cruise ship to land in Perth on Friday before weeks-long quarantine
item.description: A repatriation flight has been secured but its passengers face strict quarantine measures when they arrive.

item.title: Federal Budget 2026-27: Tax, migration, NDIS in coalition’s economic sights as Angus Taylor gives budget reply
item.description: ‘This is generational tax reform. It’s fair, simple, and honest.’

item.title: UK Health Minister Wes Streeting quits and calls for contest to oust Prime Minister Keir Starmer
item.description: A British senior minister has resigned from cabinet, paving the way for a leadership challenge.

item.title: Nationwide free RSV vaccine program for pregnant women cuts baby hospitalisations by half
item.description: ‘Before the immunisation was introduced, we would see one in 50 babies being hospitalised.’

item.title: Attacks on ship near Strait of Hormuz as US President Donald Trump, Chinese President Xi Jinping discuss Iran
item.description: New attacks on vessels near the Strait of Hormuz have brought a reminder of the costs of a prolonged stalemate.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Flight carrying hantavirus cruise ship MV Hondius passengers home lands in Perth
item.description: That’s it for our morning news coverage. Thank you for joining us, we’ll jump back on if anything breaks this afternoon.

item.title: Sam Kerr reveals career at Chelsea is about to end
item.description: ‘Someone pinch me and tell me this is another prank.’

item.title: Delta Goodrem secures Eurovision grand final spot for Australia with soaring gold piano performance
item.description: The pop powerhouse delivered one of the night’s most spectacular moments.

item.title: Denmark’s former queen Margrethe hospitalised for ‘heart spasm’
item.description: Denmark’s royal court has issued a health update.

item.title: Madonna, Shakira and K-pop supergroup BTS to perform at first World Cup final halftime show
item.description: A rock icon will curate the extravaganza in what is certain to be ‘a truly special moment’.

item.title: Aussie Min Woo Lee claims early share of PGA Championship lead as Jason Day and Cameron Smith fall short
item.description: Major winners were furious on a difficult first day of the PGA Championship.

item.title: Hollywood star Kevin Costner spotted in Brisbane as he films new production Honeymoon With Harry
item.description: The actor delighted fans as he visited a local shopping centre and caught a game at The Gabba.

item.title: Maldives cave diving tragedy leaves five Italian tourists dead in Vaavu Atoll near Malé
item.description: It is believed to be the single worst diving accident in the holiday hotspot's history.

item.title: Singer Britney Spears’ rep hits back at claims of ‘erratic’ behaviour at LA restaurant
item.description: ‘At no point did she put anyone in danger with a knife. She was cutting her hamburger in half.’

item.title: St Kilda veteran Bradley Hill recalls moment AFL passion disappeared: ‘I didn’t want to go out there’
item.description: ‘I haven’t really talked about this too much to people.’

item.title: Be quick: this 20 per cent off iPhone deal ends this Sunday
item.description: Optus is slashing $200 off the iPhone 17e, but the deal ends in just days, so this could be your last chance to lock in the savings.

item.title: South African golf star Garrick Higgo penalised for lateness at PGA Championship: ‘I am very casual’
item.description: The 27-year-old pleaded his case for leniency while knowing he only had himself to blame.

item.title: Janine Allis’ Boost Juice steps in to support four Gold Coast stores which shut amid franchise fallout
item.description: The outlets shut without notice after the franchisee behind them collapsed over an alleged unpaid tax debt.

item.title: Aussie hantavirus cruise ship passengers set for weeks in quarantine in Perth after emergency repatriation flight
item.description: The group touched down on Australian soil on Friday, but their agonising wait to return home will go on.

item.title: Quick check could land Australians share of $2.7 billion of unclaimed money
item.description: The largest single amount waiting to be banked is $1.3 million.

item.title: Gold Coast teenager charged after alleged e-bike group taunted police at Runaway Bay Sports Complex
item.description: Police allege the 13-year-old was part of a group throwing rocks at officers, damaging park facilities and posting videos of the incidents online.

item.title: Family’s heartbreaking plea to solve 30-year mystery of missing Irishman Gerard Mooney
item.description: ‘His lunch was in the fridge and his milk was dated May, that’s how we established the date he went missing.’

item.title: Delta Goodrem secures a spot in the Eurovision grand final with Beyonce playing a secret part in her performance
item.description: The Australian singer will compete in the finale of the song contest on Sunday.

item.title: 2026 Subaru Uncharted price and specs
item.description: Subaru's third electric vehicle to arrive in Australian showrooms is the Uncharted, and it's the brand's smallest and most affordable EV to date.

item.title: Australian Ford Falcon factory to become a data centre
item.description: The Blue Oval's famous Broadmeadows plant in Victoria, where generations of Ford Falcons were produced, is set to host a data centre.

item.title: Stamford Bridge to honour Sam Kerr with special name change in emotional farewell
item.description: ‘I don’t want to make it sad.’

item.title: ACCC investigates retailers over ‘manipulative tactics’ in Black Friday sales
item.description: Investigators say shoppers were falsely lured into not-so-unmissable deals.

item.title: Mum-of-seven identified as driver killed in Mother’s Day crash in the Gold Coast
item.description: The 41-year-old was heading home from a Mother’s Day market when tragedy struck.

item.title: Extension on fuel excise relief kept in play as Anthony Albanese says Australia has more petrol than before Iran war
item.description: Australia now has 44 days’ worth of petrol and more than when the Iran war broke out.

item.title: Venomous cobra leaves small French town Castelginest on tenterhooks
item.description: ‘I check under the beds every evening before my children go to sleep.’

item.title: Mason Cox defends Scott Pendlebury cash grab in games record: ‘Make as much as he wants’
item.description: ‘You just have to swallow that pill, OK?’

item.title: Rottnest Island shark attack: Man dies after mauling at Horseshoe Reef
item.description: First responders desperately tried to revive the man after the attack at a reef just off Rottnest Island.

item.title: Much-loved Tamworth trainer Stephen Meyer dies in ‘absolutely awful incident’
item.description: The racing industry has been rocked by the sad and ‘horrible news’.

item.title: Carlton captain Patrick Cripps wants to be a one club player as he reflects on whirlwind AFL season
item.description: Patrick Cripps has defended the club’s handling of Elijah Holland’s mental health episode as he reflected on a ‘career-defining’ start to 2026.

item.title: Former Supercars champion Scott McLaughlin flies during Indy Fast Friday practice
item.description: ‘It was better than going upside down.’

item.title: Federal Budget 2026: Negative gearing and capital gains tax reforms spark fears of rental crisis and business exodus
item.description: He is also predicting a rental crisis and a jump in prices as investors turn away from the housing market.

item.title: Supermarket staff allegedly threatened by a man with an axe in Western Sydney
item.description: Police have since released footage of the man in their custody.

item.title: ‘Bad North Melbourne no one wanted to see’ returns with grim thrashing against Adelaide
item.description: The rejuvenated Roos led early before suddenly folding as the Crows went ‘off the charts’ in a brutal second quarter.

item.title: Grand Theft Auto VI: Rockstar’s November title now just six months from release
item.description: ‘As a gaming developer they are in a league of their own — even on their worst day they are still better than everyone else.’

item.title: ‘Extremely confronting’ scene as couple found dead in apparent murder-suicide in small Tasmanian town
item.description: Family members were commended for ‘greatly’ helping police despite the shocking incident.

item.title: Sea Eagles star Haumole Olakau'atu sends timely reminder to Laurie Daley in big win over Wests Tigers
item.description: The Manly powerhouse proved he is in career-best form and more than ready for his State of Origin recall.

item.title: Trump says global second in command of ISIS Abu-Bilal al-Minuki eliminated in Africa airstrike
item.description: Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, second in command ‌of ISIS globally, was reportedly eliminated by US forces during an operation in Africa.

item.title: Esperanto: The international language you didn’t know existed
item.description: A nondescript house in the centre of Sydney is housing a global secret.

item.title: Rank outsider Rothfire pulls off Group 1 ‘fairytale’ to win $1.5m Doomben 10,000
item.description: Redemption was sweet as the champion horse got back on top six years after his only other Group 1 triumph.

item.title: Nathan Cleary jabs Ivan in first comments since Penrith coach’s exit reveal
item.description: The Panthers halfback had a message for his dad before issuing a fresh update on his future.

item.title: Australian family travelling the world with their three kids in Kombi van ‘ultimate adventure’
item.description: ‘The world is their classroom and you can’t replicate that in a book.’

item.title: Matildas striker Holly McNamara’s world-class goal delivers record-equalling fifth A-League title for Manchester City
item.description: The 23-year-old produced a masterclass to lead her side to victory in the grand final.

item.title: The Issue: Housing minister Clare O’Neil sits down for 7NEWS podcast to talk about negative gearing, capital gains tax changes
item.description: Clare O’Neil boasts she is leading ‘the most ambitious Australian agenda on housing that a government has had in this country for 70 years’.

item.title: Magpies youngster Oscar Steene’s dream start crashes down as scans confirm ACL injury
item.description: The 22-year-old’s career has been put on hold just hours after impressing one of the league’s best.

item.title: Kmart and Target recall walkie-talkies over frequency blunder
item.description: The popular toys, sold in Kmart and Target, can be returned in-store for a full refund.

item.description: North Queensland overcame two sin bins to beat the Roosters as one man enhanced his Maroons hopes.

item.description: Melbourne’s firepower was on full show, leaving Sam Mitchell to admit his Hawks were taught a lesson.

item.description: Melbourne’s big three orchestrated a Magic Round defeat of Parramatta to continue their climb back up the ladder.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Vision BMW Alpina concept revealed with V8 engine
item.description: BMW Alpina is aiming to fill the space between BMW and Rolls-Royce, and this concept car details the brand's design ethos.

item.title: Property owner breaks silence on Dezi Freeman police shooting in Porepunkah that shocked nation
item.description: For the first time, the property owner has revealed what really happened that fateful morning.

item.title: Chinese car price war ending as costs rise – report
item.description: Shrinking profit margins due to pricier memory chips, raw materials and crude oil could force Chinese automakers to up their prices.

item.title: Mystery surrounds man and woman found dead inside Werribee home during welfare check
item.description: Police made a grim discovery inside the Melbourne home that was due to be opened for inspection.

item.title: Saab's last cars are now up for auction
item.description: Saab fans have one last chance to buy a car from the automaker, with the zombie company selling off its fleet of pre-production prototypes.

item.title: Underdog Aussie Abbey Calwell shocks Jess Hull and national champion Claudia Hollingsworth
item.description: The rematch between Australia’s Olympic silver medallist and her biggest rival was upstaged by a podium gatecrasher.

item.title: Missing Australian hiker found alive in Taiwan after playing saxophone for rescuers
item.description: He fled into the mountains after an argument with his wife before becoming lost with no food.

item.title: These are the 10 cheapest PHEVs available in Australia in 2026
item.description: Fancy a plug-in hybrid vehicle? Here are the 10 cheapest PHEV options currently offered in the market.

item.title: Heartbreak for Delta Goodrem as Bulgaria crushes Australia’s Eurovision dream
item.description: Delta Goodrem surged into favourite status after her semi-final performance.

item.title: Socceroos hero Cammy Devlin and Hearts teammates leave stadium after ‘shameful’ pitch invasion
item.description: Minutes after losing the title decider, the Aussie and his team had to escape from a ‘deeply disturbing’ attack.

item.title: Tragic fresh details emerge after ‘horrific’ fatal shark attack off Rottnest Island as search resumes
item.description: Despite a shark sighting and ongoing search activity in the area, beaches have remained open.
